blocker: matched-model/matched-substrate head-to-head vs SREGym needs external SREGym infra + API budget (documented in 09); SREGym numbers cited+frozen, not reproduced locally
one_line: Built a cited SREGym pass@1 (E2E) ranking: stdlib rank_leaderboard.py merges arXiv:2605.07161v1 + sregym.com/leaderboard numbers with our real A1/A2 pass@1 into one ordinal table (selftest passes) — honest answer: fair single-attempt band (~34.9% retry/best_of_n) ranks 8/13, lower SREGym band above only Kimi-K2.5 and below all frontier agents, while REx 89.7% is flagged out-of-regime (multi-attempt+oracle, category error not a win), plus 11 numbered non-equivalence caveats
